title: GitHub Pages deployment + QA
description: Push all code to GitHub repo, enable GitHub Pages (Settings → Pages → Source: main branch), verify all external CDN resources load (Chart.js, Google Fonts, Phosphor Icons). QA checklist: (1) All 5 section pages load without errors; (2) Charts render correctly on desktop/tablet/mobile; (3) News overlay markers appear on stock chart; (4) Time range selectors work; (5) Scenario buttons switch projection views; (6) No console errors; (7) All internal links work. Fix any issues found.
